scripts.build: npm run build:blocks && npm run build:admin
scripts.build:blocks: concurrently -n "WP,SCSS" -c "blue,green" "wp-scripts build src/blocks/index.js --output-path=blocks/build/editor" "gulp compileStyles" && npm run postbuild:blocks
scripts.build:admin: wp-scripts build src/admin/index.js --output-path=blocks/build/dashboard && npm run postbuild:admin
scripts.package: rm -f post-carousel.zip && rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && mkdir dist/post-carousel && rsync -av --exclude=node_modules --exclude=.git --exclude=.distignore --exclude=gulpfile.js --exclude=package.json --exclude=package-lock.json --exclude=.* --exclude=README.md --exclude=src --exclude=dist . dist/post-carousel && cd dist && zip -r ../post-carousel.zip post-carousel && cd .. && rm -rf dist
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run build:admin && npm run package
scripts.makepot: php -d memory_limit=3G $(which wp) i18n make-pot . languages/post-carousel.pot --exclude=blocks/src,admin/blocks-settings/src
scripts.release:clean: npm run release && npm run clean:zip
